attributes.action: Increase the local housing allowance for private rented sector
attributes.additional_details: I am currently private renting. I am a single mum of 2 children. My housing allowance per month is £900. But all properties are way above this meaning people like me cannot afford to put a roof over our heads without getting into so much debt. Housing allowance should meet local housing costs. Housing prices have increased massively but yet the allowance is still around £500 under
attributes.background: Increase the local housing allowance to make it easier for single parents in need of housing find somewhere suitable

rejection.details:
The following petitions call for similar actions: 

Implement a rent cap on private rents matching the LHA to reduce overcrowding
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756107

Increase the Local Housing Allowance and freeze private rents
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756698
